description: Configure a shared Chrome terminal at Miami International Rentals for bilingual (English/Spanish) staff. Apply the language, translation, bookmark, search engine, and privacy/startup configurations as detailed in ~/Desktop/counter_terminal_config_guide.txt.
instruction:
Read the ~/Desktop/counter_terminal_config_guide.txt file. Your tasks involve:
1. Language & Translation: Add Spanish to Chrome's preferred languages, enable Spanish and English spell-check, and configure Google Translate (never translate English, offer to translate Spanish).
2. Bookmarks: Organize the 18 existing flat bookmarks into specific folders on the bookmark bar.
3. Search Engines: Create 3 custom search shortcuts (vin, res, plate) as specified.
4. Settings: Configure the homepage, startup behavior, download directory, and disable privacy-invasive features (passwords, autofill, third-party cookies).
